title: ValleySoft Disk Analyzer
shortDescription: Lightning-fast, beautifully designed disk space analysis tool for Windows.
description:
Analyze your disk space usage instantly and reclaim valuable storage space! The single Microsoft Store installation includes both a full Standalone UI App and a native Command Palette Extension.

Whether you prefer a beautiful, dedicated window or lightning-fast access right from your keyboard, Disk Analyzer instantly scans your local drives and presents a clean, interactive breakdown of your largest files and heaviest folders.
